title: Psitadditions - Blood and Souls
description: Discover new resources, entities, structures and blocks. Collect blood and souls to discover the mysterys of Blood and Souls.
body:
Blood and Souls is a datapack where you can discover many new features focused around blood and souls. New entities, items, blocks, structures and more... Enjoy !


## **- New Blocks:**

**Added unique blocks and 3d models**

- Blood Infusor -
_Custom block dedicated to craft every Blood and Souls items_
- Blood Tank -
_New block dedicated to blood storage_
- Soul Spawner -
_Animated block dedicated to spawn entities: a better spawner !_

  _Use all Blood and Souls custom blocks to progress in your adventure !_

## **- New entities:**

**Added 4 New entities with custom 3D models**

- Mossy brick Guard
- Mossy stone Guard
- Soul Totem
- Blood Dongeon final Boss

## **- New items:**

**Added New items and weapons with custom textures and 3D models**

- Blood, Dried Blood
- Dongeon Locator
- Bloodpulse Catalyst
- Broken Spawner
- Soul Talisman and **spawner** upgrades
- Relics, artefacts, **armor upgrades** and more !


## **- New enchantment:**

**Compatible with vanilla enchantments**

- Blood Sampler -
_Increases blood drop rate: **10% > 20%**_


_Obtainable with the enchantment table and trade with villagers_

## **- New structures:**

**Added 12 New entities**

- 4 crimson tombs variants
- 4 soul valley tombs variants
- 2 Sacrifice Altar variants
- Soul Totem structure
- Blood Dongeon


## **- New advancement page**

- Discover **16** new achievements and challenges to complete


### **More information**

This datapack is **Multiplayer friendly** !

Minecraft versions supporteds: 1.21.1

## **IMPORTANT:** [Psitadditions resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/psitadditions-resource-pack) 2.0 or higher is required for 3D models and custom items ! ! !
